title: TOAOB 50pcs Pom Poms 40mm Large Fluffy Pompoms Pink Fuzzy Balls with Wiggle Eyes for DIY Crafts Decorations
features: Material: The pompoms balls are made of polypropylene, fluffy and touches comfortable, not easy to deform. Wiggle eyes are made of plastics
Include: 50 pcs 40 mm pink pompoms in totally. 100 pcs wiggle eyes with self adhesive
Widely used: Suitable for pets to play, DIY projects, handmade, camp projects, etc. Can be sewn onto clothes, hats, you can use these pompoms and self adhesive wiggle eyes as decorations for home

Application: The pompoms crafts can be applied to DIY dolls. Fluffy pompoms balls touches with softer feeling, can be used as DIY car and bag decoration, tassel keychain, cellphone accessory, handmade, home decoration, etc
Note: The pom poms balls may be squeezed during transportation, you can use hand rub or use hair dryer can made them restitution
description: Specification: Color: Pink. Quantity and size: 40mm pompoms 50pcs. 100pcs wiggle eyes. Features: 1.These pom poms with full shape and elasticity. They are not easy to deform, suitable for DIY crafts. 2.These pom poms craft kit are suitable for arts and crafts. 3.Suitable for clothing apparel, DIY handcrafts, home decoration, etc. Note: 1.The pom poms balls may be squeezed during transportation, you can use hand rub or use hair dryer can made them restitution. 2.Due to different production batches, the actual received size may not match the size shown in the pictures, and there may be a deviation of 1-2mm. 3.Color may slightly due to the color setting of each individual monitor. Please double check the size before purchasing.
